title: Backend Team Standup
summary: Daily standup covering critical items and blockers across the backend team.
discussion_points: OAuth PR #212 needs final review — Rahul to review today
Payment integration still blocked on Razorpay credentials
API latency fix deployed to staging, monitoring results
XSS vulnerability patch ready for security review
Password reset PR approved, pending merge

action_items.description: Review and approve OAuth PR #212
Escalate Razorpay credentials with vendor account manager
Monitor API latency in staging for 24 hours before production deploy
Add rate limiting tests for OAuth endpoints

decisions: Will deploy API latency fix to production on June 18 if staging is stable
Payment integration due date extended to June 22 due to vendor blocker

title: Frontend Team Standup
summary: Frontend team standup covering dashboard analytics, dark mode, and accessibility work.
discussion_points: Admin analytics dashboard ready for integration testing
Dark mode implementation progressing well
iOS Safari layout issues reported by QA
Accessibility improvements PR ready for review
Design system v2.0 color token migration planned

action_items.description: Test dark mode CSS variables for iOS Safari compatibility
Review accessibility PR #181
Create LoadingSkeleton component for analytics charts
Export analytics dashboard as reusable component package
Patch Dependabot security alerts in admin panel

decisions: Design system v2.0 migration will be completed by end of next week
iOS Safari issues will be investigated as part of the dark mode PR

title: Platform Team Standup
summary: Platform team standup covering production issues, infrastructure, and email notification service.
discussion_points: DB connection leak fix in staging — monitoring results positive
Kubernetes deployment fix ready for review
Image processing memory leak still blocked on production access
SSL certificates need renewal before June 20
Email delivery rate dropped to 82%
Terraform cost optimization PR ready

action_items.description: Grant Sneha production access for image-processing namespace
Deploy DB connection leak fix to production after 24hr staging monitor
Renew and deploy SSL certificates for all production domains
Investigate email bounce handling regression
Set up Kafka topics for email notification service
Update Grafana dashboards with new Prometheus data source

decisions: SSL certificate deployment will be done during low-traffic window (10 PM IST)
Will use Option B (Go WebSocket server) for production real-time notifications

title: Sprint 24 Review Meeting
summary: Sprint 24 review. Assessed completed work, carryover items, and velocity.
discussion_points: Sprint velocity: 38 story points completed out of 52 planned
User management API delivered (PROJ-1002)
Payment schema delivered (PROJ-1005)
OAuth in progress but not merged (PROJ-1001)
Payment integration blocked by vendor (PROJ-1004)
Multiple production incidents consumed capacity
3 tickets had poor quality descriptions

action_items.description: Create a ticket template with mandatory fields to prevent poor quality tickets
Set up automated certificate renewal to prevent future expiration risks
Prepare technical feasibility documents for Q3 roadmap by Thursday
Track production incident frequency and correlate with deployment frequency

decisions: Sprint 25 will have a 15% buffer for production incident response
Poor quality tickets will be sent back to reporters with a quality checklist
Payment integration will carry over to Sprint 25

title: Security Incident Review - XSS Vulnerability
summary: Reviewed XSS vulnerability found in user profile page. Discussed fix approach and prevention measures.
discussion_points: XSS vulnerability in /profile/{id} bio field
CVSS score 7.5 — needs immediate patching
Fix approach: input sanitization + CSP headers + output encoding
Need to audit other endpoints for similar issues
Prevention: add automated security scanning to CI pipeline

action_items.description: Patch XSS vulnerability and submit PR for review
Audit all user-input endpoints for similar XSS vulnerabilities
Add OWASP ZAP security scanning to CI/CD pipeline
Conduct security training session for the team

decisions: All user-input fields will require sanitization going forward
CSP headers will be added to all production services
Security scanning will be mandatory in CI pipeline

title: SSO Integration Discussion - GlobalTech
summary: Discussed SSO integration requirements for GlobalTech enterprise client. Assessed feasibility and resource allocation.
discussion_points: GlobalTech requires SAML 2.0 and Azure AD integration
2-week deadline is tight but feasible if we leverage OAuth work
Priya's OAuth implementation can be extended for SSO
Need dedicated resources for 2 weeks
Testing with GlobalTech's Azure AD instance required

action_items.description: Create SSO integration architecture document
Set up Azure AD test tenant for development
Request GlobalTech's Azure AD metadata for integration testing
Estimate engineering effort and create Jira epic for SSO

decisions: SSO will be built on top of the OAuth infrastructure
Priya will lead the SSO implementation with Vikram assisting
Will use a SAML library (python-saml) rather than building from scratch

title: Production Incident Debrief - API Latency
summary: Post-incident debrief for API latency degradation affecting payments, users, and orders endpoints.
discussion_points: P95 latency increased from 200ms to 1.2s after payment-service v1.5.0 deployment
Root cause: Missing database indexes on newly added transaction history queries
Secondary cause: N+1 queries in the orders endpoint
Customer complaints started within 2 hours of deployment
Detection was delayed — alerting threshold was too high

action_items.description: Add missing database indexes for transaction queries
Fix N+1 queries in orders endpoint
Lower P95 latency alert threshold from 1s to 500ms
Add mandatory performance testing for all database-heavy deployments
Create deployment checklist including query performance verification

decisions: All deployments with new database queries require EXPLAIN ANALYZE review
P95 alert threshold will be lowered to 500ms
Performance testing will be added to CI pipeline for critical services

title: Design System v2.0 Review
summary: Review of Design System v2.0 changes including new color tokens, spacing, and dark mode support.
discussion_points: New color token system replacing old palette
Dark mode specific tokens and component variants
Updated icon library with better accessibility
Migration plan from old to new tokens
Timeline for deprecating old color palette

action_items.description: Update all frontend components to use new color tokens
Update form components with new design tokens
Create migration guide for design system v2.0
Create Storybook documentation for all updated components

decisions: Old color palette will be deprecated on July 1
All new components must use v2.0 tokens immediately
Migration will be done incrementally, component by component

title: Payment Integration Status Review
summary: Reviewed Razorpay integration status. Discussed vendor blockers and alternative plans.
discussion_points: Production credentials still pending from Razorpay compliance team
Sandbox testing is complete and working
Webhook signature verification has intermittent failures (5%)
PCI DSS compliance documentation needs to be submitted
Load testing shows issues above 750 concurrent webhooks

action_items.description: Call Razorpay account manager to expedite credential delivery
Set up sandbox environment for end-to-end testing
Fix webhook signature verification clock skew issue
Submit PCI DSS compliance documentation to Razorpay
Implement async webhook processing to handle higher concurrency

decisions: Due date extended to June 22
Will implement async webhook processing (queue-based) for scalability
Compliance documentation is a prerequisite for production credentials

title: QA Sync - Test Planning
summary: QA team sync on test planning for current sprint items and production fixes.
discussion_points: Password reset flow test cases needed before merge
Load testing results for payment webhooks
Search regression with special characters
OAuth integration testing plan
Mobile login issue regression test

action_items.description: Write automated test cases for password reset flow
Set up load testing for payment webhooks at higher concurrency
Create regression test suite for search with special characters
Create OAuth integration test plan

decisions: Password reset cannot be merged without automated tests
Load testing threshold will be set at 1000 concurrent webhooks
Search regression will be tested against the full character set

title: Architecture Discussion - Email Notification Service
summary: Discussed architecture for the centralized email notification service.
discussion_points: Service will use Kafka for async message processing
Template management using Jinja2
Queue-based sending with retry logic
Bounce handling and suppression list
Delivery tracking and metrics

action_items.description: Create architecture design document for email notification service
Set up Kafka topics for email events
Research and select email delivery provider (SES vs SendGrid)
Define email template schema and create initial templates

decisions: Will use Kafka for event-driven architecture
AWS SES preferred over SendGrid for cost reasons
Templates will be stored in database, not filesystem

summary: Weekly 1:1 between Engineering Manager and Frontend Tech Lead.
discussion_points: Frontend team capacity for SSO work

Rajesh's performance and growth areas
Hiring discussion for additional frontend engineer
